# Comprehensive bash callgraph demo
env MCP_BASH_COVERAGE=1
env MCP_BASH_COVERAGE_DIR=$WORK/bash-coverage

# Direct bash command
bash 'echo "Direct command test"'

# Create and run a script
exec chmod 0755 pipeline.sh
bash './pipeline.sh'

# Create a dummy scripttest file to analyze
exec sh -c 'printf "exec bash \"echo hello\"\nexec bash ./pipeline.sh\n" > demo.txt'

# Show the call graph
exec testcallgraph -bash -format text demo.txt

-- pipeline.sh --
#!/bin/bash
echo "Starting pipeline"

# Call other tools
mcpdiff file1.mcp file2.mcp || echo "mcpdiff not available"

# Call another script
if [ -x process.sh ]; then
    bash ./process.sh
fi

# Direct command
echo "Pipeline complete"

-- process.sh --
#!/bin/bash
echo "Processing data"

# Simulate some tool calls
for i in 1 2 3; do
    echo "Processing step $i"
done
